message:
refactor(test): cleanup clippy lints in dispatch latency and conformance guard

event_dispatch_latency.rs:
- Change measure_event_latency payload parameter from Option<Value> to
  &Option<Value> to avoid unnecessary clones at each call site
- Use raw string literal (r"...") instead of r#"..."# where inner quotes
  are not needed in synth_noop_extension format string
- Remove unused format argument in scaling table header

ext_conformance_guard.rs:
- Remove unnecessary .clone() calls on String values that are moved
  immediately after (settings.time_ms, settings.home, settings.cwd)
- Remove unused extract_text() helper function (dead code)
- Remove unused import std::path::Path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
